message:
perf(analysis): optimize BFS queue to avoid slice reallocation

Replace the slice-shift pattern (queue = queue[1:]) with a head index
approach for the BFS phase in betweenness centrality approximation.

The previous implementation reallocated the underlying array on every
dequeue operation. The new approach tracks the head position with an
integer index, avoiding all reallocations during BFS traversal while
maintaining the same algorithmic complexity.

This is a standard optimization for queue-based algorithms in Go where
the queue is processed once and then discarded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
